extract: Palkia (Japanese: パルキア Palkia) is a dual-type Water/Dragon Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Palkia transforms into its Origin Forme using the Lustrous Globe. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Form data for these details.) Along with Dialga and Giratina, Palkia is one of the Pokémon of myth created by Arceus, representing space. In the past, it was worshipped by the Pearl Clan under the name almighty Sinnoh (Japanese: シンオウ様(さま) Shin'ou-sama). Palkia is the game mascot of Pokémon Pearl Version and its remake Pokémon Shining Pearl, appearing on the box art of both games in its normal form.
